curation.synopsis: On the mining world of Ghyre, an Imperial Fists Honour Guard has been butchered upon ground they swore to defend, and a hidden cult is poisoning the planet's miners and its complacent aristocracy alike. Primaris Librarian Aster Lydorran is sent to root it out and finds himself locked in a duel of minds with a psyker whose strength rivals his own. Forced to assume command of a fractious Imperial defence, Lydorran must drag the proud sons of Dorn out from behind their walls and accept allies they would normally disdain — because the cult feeding on Ghyre is the harbinger of something far larger, and it is reaching towards Terra itself.
